full_text:
Zheng Xuan (Kangcheng) 鄭玄 (康成)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Xuan (鄭玄), styledKangcheng (康成), was born in Gaomi county, Beihai commandery. Loved wine, a leading scholar of his day but hated court life. Had many students. Zheng Xuan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Tao Qian, Yuan Shao, and the Wei Kingdom. Zheng Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographySanguo Yanyi
When Liu Bei turned fifteen his mother sent him away to serve under Zheng Xuan and Lu Zhi as masters in an effort to further his education. He stayed with them for some time, and forged a friendship that would come into play later in his life (he would meet Lu Zhi again). He also met and became great friends with Gongsun Zan.
